nasb.text: The high priest stood up and came forward and questioned Jesus, saying, “Do You not answer? What is it that these men are testifying against You?”

esv.text: And the high priest stood up in the midst and asked Jesus, “Have you no answer to make? What is it that these men testify against you?”

cnv.text: 大祭司站起來，走到中間，問耶穌：“這些人作證控告你的是甚麼呢？你怎麼不回答呢？”

ccb.text: 最后，大祭司在众人面前站起来质问耶稣：“你不回答吗？这些人作证控告你的是什么呢？”

csbs.text: 于是大祭司就起来站到中间问耶稣，说：“对这些人控告你的事，你什么都不回应吗？”
